content.problemStatement:
There is a game played on a one-dimensional axis. NNN stones will appear on this axis. Each of these stones is described by three numbers xix_ixi‚Äã, tit_iti‚Äã, cic_ici‚Äã, meaning the stone will appear at a point xix_ixi‚Äã, at time tit_iti‚Äã, and has a value cic_ici‚Äã.

There are ppp players initially (at time 000) all at the point 000. If a player is at a point xxx at time ttt, then at time t+1t + 1t+1, he/she can be either at xxx or at x+1x+1x+1. A player is able to pick up a stone with value cic_ici‚Äã if he/she is at the point xix_ixi‚Äã at the time tit_iti‚Äã. Picking up a stone does not take any time. Each stone can be picked up at most once.

The score of a player is defined as the sum of values of stones he/she has picked up. The score of a number of players is simply the sum of their individual scores. Devise a strategy for the players to gain the maximum total score.

You should find the maximum possible total score for each number of players ppp between 111 and KKK inclusive.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers xix_ixi‚Äã, tit_iti‚Äã and cic_ici‚Äã.


Output Format
For each test case, print KKK lines. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines should contain a single integer - the maximum total score for iii players.
constraints: 1‚â§xi,ti,ci‚â§1091 \leq x_i, t_i, c_i \leq 10^91‚â§xi‚Äã,ti‚Äã,ci‚Äã‚â§109 for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5‚ãÖ1045 \cdot 10^45‚ãÖ104
the sum of N‚ãÖKN \cdot KN‚ãÖK over all test cases does not exceed 5‚ãÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚ãÖ105
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 200200200
the sum of N‚ãÖKN \cdot KN‚ãÖK over all test cases does not exceed 4‚ãÖ1034 \cdot 10^34‚ãÖ103

Explanation:
Example case 1: There is only one player. The best choice is to pick up stone 222 and stone 333.
